description_long: This is a round cake with a single visible layer, topped with a smooth white icing and presented on a large, flat, blue plate. The cake has been cut into three large triangular slices, with one slice separated from the rest, revealing a dense, brown, speckled interior that suggests a fruit or nut cake. A single blue candle with a yellow flame is placed on top of one of the slices, adding a celebratory touch. The icing appears evenly spread and slightly glossy, with clean, straight edges where the cake has been sliced. The plate is wide and flat, providing ample space around the cake, and its blue color contrasts with the cake's warm tones. The overall presentation is simple and minimalist, with no additional decorations or embellishments beyond the candle.
description: A single-layer, brown cake with white icing, cut into three slices and displayed on a blue plate with a single blue candle on top. The cake has a dense, speckled interior and a minimalist, clean appearance.
description_view_0: The cake is seen from above, showing all three slices arranged on the blue plate with the candle clearly visible on the central slice.
description_view_1: This angled side view highlights the separation between the slices and the height of the cake, with the candle standing on the nearest slice.
description_view_2: A direct side view of a single slice with the candle, showing the cake's interior texture and the smooth white icing on top.
description_view_3: Another angled view showing the three separated slices, emphasizing the cake's thickness and the placement of the candle.
